criteria.criterion: DBB-m9-002: cp -r on non-existent source returns error
DBB-m9-003: cp without -r on directory returns error
DBB-m9-004: echo > creates file with content
DBB-m9-007: echo >> creates file if not exists
DBB-m9-008: echo > in readOnly mode returns Permission denied
DBB-m9-009: mv directory to new location
DBB-m9-010: mv directory to existing destination
DBB-m9-011: mv non-existent directory returns error
DBB-m9-013: ls -a on directory with no dotfiles includes . and ..
DBB-m9-014: ls without -a does not show dotfiles
